name: oaustegard-claude-skills
description: Community skills for Claude Code and Claude.ai

plugins.name: ai-and-reasoning
plugins.description: AI model invocation, multi-agent orchestration, prompt distillation, and structured reasoning frameworks.

plugins.name: code-intelligence
plugins.description: Codebase exploration, navigation, mapping, and static analysis tools for understanding unfamiliar codebases.

plugins.name: data-and-visualization
plugins.description: Data analysis, charting, forecasting, and interactive visualization tools.

plugins.name: development-tools
plugins.description: Software development utilities: MCP servers, bookmarklets, frameworks, patching, and environment validation.

plugins.name: environment-and-config
plugins.description: Environment setup, credential management, container building, and workflow orchestration.

plugins.name: github-and-git
plugins.description: GitHub repository access, CLI operations, indexing, and git workflow tools.

plugins.name: knowledge-and-memory
plugins.description: Research methodology, persistent memory, iterative workflows, and project knowledge management.

plugins.name: media-processing
plugins.description: Image manipulation, video/audio processing, SVG conversion, and computer vision augmentation.

plugins.name: skill-development
plugins.description: Tools for creating, versioning, installing, inspecting, and orchestrating Claude skills.

plugins.name: social-and-lifestyle
plugins.description: Social media browsing, content analysis, music control, and everyday utility tools.

plugins.name: web-and-retrieval
plugins.description: Web content fetching, browser automation, and URL handling tools.
